description:
This intermediate-to-advanced quiz assesses practical Node.js I/O skills, including file system operations, stream management, buffer handling, and encoding efficiency. Presented in an enthusiastic and encouraging tone, it guides developers through best practices for optimizing data flow in backend applications.
Topics: Node.js I/O operations, File system management, Data streaming, Buffers and encoding, Performance optimization
Audience: Node.js developers and backend engineering students
